description_long: This is a tall, slender obelisk constructed from light-colored stone, rising from a multi-tiered square base. Prominently featured on one side of the base is a detailed sculptural group, possibly depicting a historical or mythological scene with human and animal figures. The shaft of the obelisk is smooth and tapers gently upward, culminating in a simple, pointed tip. The monument stands on a paved square platform, which provides a formal setting and elevates the structure. The overall design is classical, with the sculptural relief adding a focal point of interest and narrative. No visible inscriptions are present, and the surface appears to be well-maintained and clean.
description: A tall, light stone obelisk with a sculptural group at its base, set on a multi-tiered square platform. The shaft is smooth and tapers to a pointed tip, with classical styling and no visible inscriptions.
description_view_0: Side view showing the obelisk's shaft and the sculptural group attached to the base, with the monument's square platform visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the detailed sculptural group at the base, directly facing the viewer, and the full width of the platform.
description_view_2: Angled view showing the sculptural group from the side and the obelisk's smooth shaft, with the platform extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear view of the obelisk, showing the plain shaft and the back of the base, with no sculptural elements visible.
attribute_ornamentation: A sculptural group featuring human and animal figures is present on one side of the base, rendered in a realistic, classical style.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered square platform made of the same light stone as the obelisk, with steps leading up to the main pedestal and a sculptural group attached to one face.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a simple, pointed pyramid shape with a smooth finish and no additional decoration.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is set on a paved square platform, with no other notable surrounding features visible.
